opsRepo.headAtStart: 07eaefa docs: add benben feishu test ingress gate

productRepo.headAtStart: ef44454 feat: add benben shadow service-entry harness

confirmedFacts: User authorized entering repair phase with the exact phrase '进入修复阶段'.
No live write, service restart, env edit, config edit, callback change, or channel enablement was performed.
Old prod is active/running and currently has Feishu channel/plugin enabled.
Shadow is active/running and still has Feishu/Telegram/QQBot channels and plugins disabled.
Shadow and old prod currently reference the same FEISHU_APP_SECRET value, checked by equality only; no secret value was printed.
No redacted evidence found an isolated test/shadow/sandbox Feishu surface in shadow env/config.

blockers.name: isolated_feishu_test_surface_not_proven
blockers.reason: The L3 gate requires a separate non-production Feishu test app/robot/callback surface. Current evidence shows the shadow service has copied production Feishu secret material and no test-surface marker.

blockers.name: old_prod_feishu_still_active
blockers.reason: Old prod still has Feishu enabled. Enabling shadow against the same production bot would violate the no dual-consumer rule.

blockers.name: shadow_real_feishu_ingress_not_yet_validated
blockers.reason: The accepted shadow validation is synthetic/local fixture based. Real Feishu ingress and delivery boundaries are not yet validated against a separate test surface.

actionsNotTaken: Did not enable shadow Feishu channel or plugin.
Did not restart or reload openclaw-benben.service.
Did not stop, restart, reload, or modify openclaw-gateway.service.
Did not change Feishu callbacks or production bot settings.
Did not run a provider/model network call or send a Feishu message.
requiredEvidenceBeforeNextL3Attempt: Redacted proof of a separate non-production Feishu test app/robot identity that is not the current production benben bot.
A config plan that points shadow only at the isolated test surface.
A rollback snapshot plan for every shadow file that would be changed.
A receive-only/dry-run first verification plan with delivery disabled or limited to the isolated test surface.
A stop condition that aborts if production bot identifiers appear in shadow Feishu config.

safeNextStep.description: Implement or identify a shadow-safe real Feishu receive-only/dry-run adapter and tests in the product repo before another live Feishu L3 attempt.
